name: Scalloped Scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and pick over scallops.
2. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add cracker crumbs to the melted butter and spread them evenly in a baking dish.
4. Place a layer of scallops on top of the cracker crumbs.
5. Pour half of the heavy cream, salt, pepper, and Worcestershire sauce over the scallops.
6. Repeat steps 2-5 with remaining ingredients.
7. Sprinkle buttered bread crumbs evenly over the top of the scallops.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 minutes, or until the crumbs are golden brown.
Note: Do not rush the cooking process. Allow the dish to cook slowly and evenly in the oven. Turn off the heat when the desired temperature is reached.
